Our Services

Professional electrician solutions for every need

Electrical Repair Services

Fast, reliable repairs for any electrical issue in your home or business.

Learn More →

Electrical Installations

Expert electrical installations for new construction, remodels, and upgrades.

Learn More →

Lighting Services

Illuminate your home or business with our expert lighting solutions.

Learn More →

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Ensure your home's electrical system is safe and up-to-date with a panel upgrade.

Learn More →

Wiring & Rewiring Services

Comprehensive wiring and rewiring services for homes and businesses throughout Boise.

Learn More →

Commercial Electrical Services

Reliable electrical solutions for Boise businesses.

Winters Electric LLC

Trusted electrician professionals serving Boise, ID and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
